title: Droopy likes your face
text:
Droopy likes your face
作者
C418
发行时间
2011年3月14日
时长
01:56
音乐流派
电子音乐
链接
Bandcamp
Spotify
YouTube Music
网易云音乐
Minecraft - Volume Alpha
No.24
◄ Droopy likes ricochet
虽然没有出现在minecraft.net的视频中，但仍然完整地创作了这首歌。
——C418评论于bandcamp.com
Droopy likes your face是一首由C418创作的音乐，该音乐未被游戏使用。
描述
Droopy likes your face接续Droopy likes ricochet，包含更多的鼓声和一种管乐器，同时伴有回声般的“喵”声和被切碎的机器人声音样本。在大约0:39处，出现了声像故事书The Droopy Dragon的语音样本，其中包含台词“Droopy looks in a cave”（Droopy向洞穴里看）、“No one is there”（那里没有任何人）、“Droopy looks under a tree”（Droopy向树下看）和“Droopy is enormous”（Droopy十分巨大），这些台词在整首歌中反复出现。
歌词
[00:40]Droopy looks in Droopy looks [00:43]Droopy looks in Droopy looks [00:45]Droopy looks in Droopy looks [00:48]Droopy looks in Droopy looks [00:50]Droopy looks in a cave [00:53]No one is there [00:55]Droopy looks under a tree [00:58]Droopy is enormous [01:00]Droopy looks in a cave [01:03]No one is there [01:05]Droopy looks under a tree [01:08]Droopy is enormous [01:10]Droopy looks in a cave [01:13]No one is there [01:15]Droopy looks under a tree [01:18]Droopy is enormous [01:20]Droopy looks in a cave [01:23]No one is there [01:25]Droopy looks under a tree [01:28]Droopy is enormous [01:30]Droopy looks in a cave [01:33]No one is there [01:35]Droopy looks under a tree [01:38]Droopy is enormous [01:40]Droopy looks in a cave [01:43]No one is there [01:45]Droopy looks under a tree [01:48]Droopy is enormous
你知道吗
此曲目的歌词是由听者听录的，因此在不同平台上有不同版本的歌词。
此曲目来自C418的前一张专辑life changing moments seem minor in pictures。
C418专辑148中的Droopy Remembers是本曲目和Droopy likes ricochet的混音版。
该曲目的人声片段来自C418购买的Kontakt软件采样器的素材库，而这些声音片段出自德州仪器的Magic Wand Reader阅读其出版的有声读物The Droopy Dragon的阅读音效采样。
曲名“Droopy likes your face”是C418对其内容的猜测，C418在创作时并不知道这些声音片段实际上在说什么，该曲名的原句为“Droopy looks in a cave”。
该曲目的人声片段中总共有四个不同的句子：
“Droopy looks in a cave”和“No one is there”出自The Droopy Dragon的第24页。
“Droopy looks under a tree”出自The Droopy Dragon的第26页。
“Droopy is enormous”出自The Droopy Dragon的第21页。
Magic Wand Reader阅读The Droopy Dragon的声音片段在C418的专辑148的曲目Droopy Remembers中再次被使用。
参考
https://youtu.be/G7SOmfj-hmM
Minecraft Volume Alpha – C418。“I get a lot of questions on what Droopy says. To be fair, I don't know.”
